questionHtml:
The digestive system hydrolyses macromolecules into monomers for absorption. Which chemical(s) produced by humans can perform hydrolysis?

I.   Cellulase

II.  Glycogen

III. Amylase

A.  I and III only

B.  II and III only

C.  III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: The digestive system hydrolyses macromolecules into monomers for absorption. Which chemical(s) produced by humans can perform hydrolysis? I. Cellulase II. Glycogen III. Amylase A.
